title: Watching Eva With Friends
wikitext:
[]: Watching Eva With Friends             Quote Post by Machinehead » Sat Aug 13, 2005 8:58 pm Well, I finally finished the series with a friend. We had been watching it almost every time he came over, on and off, for the past 6 months or so. We finished The End of Evangelion today, and it was so much fun watching him react to the events as they took place. His first "W-T-F" of the series was when Kaji showed Misato Lilith. His expression was priceless. Oh, and when the the organic brown thing came out of Rei in "Rei III: Director's Cut". Wow, it was so funny. He sat there for a minute, his mouth wide open. Then it was followed by a "Oh, what just happened?" And the best part was his akward silence during the Asuka Coma scene, and the laughter that followed when it was over.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sat Aug 13, 2005 9:37 pm My favorite reactions from friends as we watched NGE include the loud shriek that one (18yo, female) let out as EVA-01 crushed the entry plug with Toji in it, the looks of shock and stupification at the outcome of Rei I's confrontation with Naoko, and the look of pure disgust on the part of my pal thewayniac at the, er, 'climax' of the hospital scene at the begining of ep25' Air...

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Sat Aug 13, 2005 10:25 pm Shin-seiki wrote: My favorite reactions from friends as we watched NGE include the loud shriek that one (18yo, female) let out as EVA-01 crushed the entry plug with Toji in it, the looks of shock and stupification at the outcome of Rei I's confrontation with Naoko, and the look of pure disgust on the part of my pal thewayniac at the, er, 'climax' of the hospital scene at the begining of ep25' Air...

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Mon Aug 15, 2005 10:04 am I hate to quote the commentary, but: "and there's the money shot" so far, I really havent seen it with friends (most of them would be...rather weirded out by it)

[]:             Quote Post by Toilet Duck » Tue Aug 23, 2005 12:47 am you said "climax"! *snicker snicker snort* </SEVENTHGRADER>

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Tue Aug 23, 2005 8:29 am it was a while ago when i showed one of my friends eva, and found that i was the one coming out with all of the hilarious reactions even though i'd seen it douzens of times before. but that scene in EoE........ i got him back at that one

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Tue Aug 23, 2005 8:58 am Quite the opening, though I found that some people didn't find it the least bit disturbing for the first time they saw it...

[]:             Quote Post by sachiel » Tue Aug 23, 2005 10:39 am Shnooks never actually got through her head the fact that Shinji was masturbating in the opening scene until I told her. I think she was in denial. ...and her reaction was priceless. -10 respect points for Shinji, I think.

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Tue Aug 23, 2005 12:31 pm to be honest, i didn't realise what IT was untill i watched the commentary afterwards to try and take my mind away from topping myself :roll:

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Tue Aug 23, 2005 2:09 pm Well, unless you play the volume pretty loud and are actually thinking about that which is on his hand, its kinda hard to figure out...

[]:             Quote Post by sachiel » Tue Aug 23, 2005 2:50 pm sadsadshinji wrote: Well, unless you play the volume pretty loud and are actually thinking about that which is on his hand, its kinda hard to figure out...

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Tue Aug 23, 2005 2:52 pm Well, I turned the volume way way up once, and noticed the heavy breathing (This was, of course, after I knew what he had done...)

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Tue Aug 23, 2005 3:41 pm *phone rings* OMF: Hello? PM: (quavering voice) **** you! OMF: What?! PM: **** you!!! OMF: Is this PM? PM: **** YOU!!! OMF: You watched End of Evangelion didn't you? PM: **** YOU!!!!! I'm mentally scarred for LIFE!! OMF: What did you think? PM: I just... I mean... dead.... eyeballs... this is worse than Perfect Blue! OMF: Any thoughts? PM: What the hell....WHAT THE HELL?! OMF: Good wasn't it. PM: **** YOU!!!

[]:             Quote Post by sachiel » Tue Aug 23, 2005 4:02 pm @sadsadshinji: Yeah, same. XD My friend was there, and she's like, "OH MY GOD. Shinji. MASTURBATES. IN PUBLIC." (Seriously, it's NERV. Someone's always watching. XD) Almost the same reaction as when she saw "I need you" typed on Maya's laptop before she died. Except that was more of an "Oh em gee, I had no idea Maya was a lesbian." @OMF: o_O;; Whoa.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Tue Aug 23, 2005 4:08 pm Well, the "I need you" typing sequence was the only real indication of Maya's feelings for her sempai

[]: ^_^ \/,,             Quote Post by chiefen » Tue Aug 23, 2005 4:18 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: *phone rings* OMF: Hello? PM: (quavering voice) **** you! OMF: What?! PM: **** you!!! OMF: Is this PM? PM: **** YOU!!! OMF: You watched End of Evangelion didn't you? PM: **** YOU!!!!! I'm mentally scarred for LIFE!! OMF: What did you think? PM: I just... I mean... dead.... eyeballs... this is worse than Perfect Blue! OMF: Any thoughts? PM: What the hell....WHAT THE HELL?! OMF: Good wasn't it. PM: **** YOU!!!

[]:             Quote Post by sachiel » Tue Aug 23, 2005 4:33 pm sadsadshinji wrote: Well, the "I need you" typing sequence was the only real indication of Maya's feelings for her sempai

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Tue Aug 23, 2005 4:41 pm And the best part was his akward silence during the Asuka Coma scene, and the laughter that followed when it was over.

[]:             Quote Post by K2Grey » Tue Aug 23, 2005 7:35 pm sachiel wrote: sadsadshinji wrote: Well, unless you play the volume pretty loud and are actually thinking about that which is on his hand, its kinda hard to figure out...

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Tue Aug 23, 2005 8:40 pm Probably ordered by Anno...
